NEXT-3 (analyze WORK Brick): cross-read agent/objects/*.yaml and agent/tool_policies/*.yaml to record which lanes carry tool-policy:read-write-scoped vs reviewer-readonly and trace the effective_write = (Brick write_scope NEED AND tool-policy AND observed-write adapter) computation to its code locus.
NEXT-4 (findings WORK Brick): classify each of the four seats confirmed/not_proven with citations and state which principle prediction is structure-provable vs not_proven absent a live run.
These are proposed boundaries only, not a Movement decision; the Link gate owns sufficiency and Movement.

deferred_smith_review_queue: Composition decision: this Building ran plan -> review -> closure with no dedicated WORK/investigation node; the file:line investigation emerged across the review and closure reads rather than from one owned node. Confirm whether that is the intended shape for read-only proof Buildings.

The principle 'adapter = full-power connector; YAML/tool_policy/write_scope = control' is proven by code structure only; the live write-admissibility half remains a not_proven prediction pending a deliberately declared write-scope live run.
narrowly_proven: Principle (structure level): the adapter is a full-power connector and YAML/tool_policy/write_scope are the control. adapter:claude-local capability = {READ, WRITE, WEB} (adapter_constants.py:96-98) yet effective write requires the three-term intersection (agent_adapter.py:868-877); capability alone never opens write.
Seat (a) adapter capability — CONFIRMED NOT the cap: claude-local is write-capable and is in _OBSERVED_WRITE_ADAPTER_REFS (adapter_constants.py:75-98).

Seat (c) Agent YAML/tool_policy — CONFIRMED a control gate: this Building carries tool-policy:leader-coordination, not READ_WRITE_TOOL_POLICY_REF, so the second effective_write term is False (agent_adapter.py:875; adapter_constants.py:26).

Seat (d) Brick write_scope NEED absence — CONFIRMED a control gate: write_scope={} makes bool(request.write_scope) False (agent_adapter.py:874), so effective_write is False and read_tier opens (agent_adapter.py:880-911).

Prediction 'read-only Brick -> read-only projected tools' is proven by code structure: with no write_scope and a read-tier policy, effective_write=False and the read browse tier opens for claude-local.

The carried plan node was return-shape complete and boundary-clean, and the carried review reproduced the structural intersection independently — the parent objective's file:line evidence exists across the carried AgentFacts plus this closure.
